description_long: This is a robust, double-headed sledgehammer with a heavy, metallic head and a long, straight handle. The head is composed of two large, rectangular striking faces, each with beveled edges and a slightly textured, stone-like appearance, suggesting durability and strength. The central section of the head features a metallic connector with angular, reinforced elements, possibly for added stability. The handle is made of a dark, wood-like material with visible grain, capped at both ends with metal for reinforcement and to prevent splitting. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible branding or decorative elements, emphasizing function over form. The hammer appears well-crafted and pristine, suitable for heavy-duty tasks in urban construction or demolition settings.
description: A heavy-duty, double-headed sledgehammer with a metallic head and a long, reinforced wooden handle. The design is robust and utilitarian, ideal for demanding urban tasks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical double striking faces and the reinforced central connector, with the handle extending downward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rectangular profile of the hammer head and the full length of the handle.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the dual striking faces and the central connector.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the rectangular head profile and the straight handle.
attribute_handle_type: Straight wooden handle with a dark finish, reinforced with metal caps at both ends, smooth and cylindrical with no visible grip enhancements.
attribute_head_type: Double-headed sledgehammer type with two large, rectangular steel striking faces and a reinforced central connector.
